creator: vvelox@vvelox.net
text:
pkg-static does not like the missing avidemux2_icon.png file.

Fix: delete files/avidemux2.desktop.in
How-To-Repeat: 

1: Try to build it on a to date system with pkg(8).
2: Watch it die during install as there is no avidemux2_icon.png included in the port.
3: Apply fix and enjoy.
